title: Surgical Centers, Med-Tech Stocks Up On Pent-Up Surgical Demand
text: After a pandemic pause, hip and knee replacements are back. Long-postponed surgeries are being rescheduled, which is bad for business at insurance companies like UnitedHealth Group Inc. NYSE: UNH, but potentially good business for surgery centers like Surgery Partners Inc. NASDAQ: SGRY and companies like Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc. NYSE: ZBH that manufacture joint-replacement technologies.
